reference: I am a forty-three-year-old woman, and I recently found a lump on the side of my left neck the size of a large grape. If I push on it, it is a little painful, but it is somewhat hard, not squishy. I just want to make sure if this is something I need to see a doctor for. Also, I am on Coumadin since I am a Factor V carrier, but I don't know if that would make a difference.
text: I am a forty-three-year-old woman, and I recently found a lump on the side of my left neck the size of a large grape. If I push on it, it is a little painful, but it is somewhat hard, not squishy. I just want to make sure if this is something I need to see a doctor for. Also, I am on TMD since I am a factor C carrier, but I don't know what that would mean to someone.
